posts.text: Liberty is not free. This is the mark of the new Tea Party. On the celebration of the 250th, we unite. We tell the Senate who is in charge. The people want voter ID. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents unite.

Speaker Johnson is wasting his time on a clean extension of FISA if it doesn’t have the SAVE America Act attached. Myself and others will vote it down until it does.

punchbowl.news/article/house…

At the end of the day there’s only one reason why the Senate won’t secure our elections: CORRUPTION.

There’s simply no other excuse to subvert the will of 85% of Americans.

The Senate would walk over broken glass to pass FISA, which is why FISA is the perfect vehicle to attach the SAVE America Act and force a vote. 

No more excuses. No more delays. Attach it, pass it, and get voter ID done.

Video

This Senate works for you. They will be flying home at the end of this weekend and you have the right to ask them respectful questions in the airport as to why the hell they aren’t doing their jobs. We are literally at a turning point in our country. Voter ID is the fundamental principle of protecting our republic and if they cannot deliver on this, they do not deserve your fault or to get elected. Make your voices heard. We are the people in this country, not special interest or sellouts.


ALX
The Senate dam want IDs for federal officials, but not to vote in an election.

I can’t believe that the Senate is opposed to the most popular issues in the country. Banning insider trading & voter ID. Are we in a parallel universe? How about you guys stop jacking up our country and do your jobs.

Chuck Schumer wants illegals to vote in elections. That’s why he’s so opposed to proof of citizenship. He literally stated that he wants mass amnesty for illegals.


Steven Dennis (@StevenTDennis)

Schumer tells press Democrats are *not* opposed to photo voter ID.



— https://nitter.net/StevenTDennis/status/2033986206288040222#m

Reason #352 why we must pass the SAVE America Act: 

@JamesOKeefeIII exposes massive election fraud in California, NGOs paying homeless to register to vote and signing ballot petitions with fake addresses. 

The American people want to put an end to this madness.


James O'Keefe (@JamesOKeefeIII)

CALIFORNIA ELECTIONS FRAUD CASH FOR BALLOTS PART I: Homeless Bribed with Cash & Drugs In Exchange For Registering To Vote & Signing Election Petitions Caught On Tape Undercover On Skid Row In Californi

We will continue to do so💡

washingtonexaminer.com/news/…
Watch me @RepLuna on “Carl Higbie: Frontline” on NEWSMAX tonight at 6pm.

While the Senate may be full of RINOs and uniparty swamp creatures, @SenTuberville proves common sense does still exist 👏🏼


Coach Tommy Tuberville (@SenTuberville)

Until we force the talking filibuster or nuke it altogether, the SAVE America Act is dead in the water.

It makes ZERO SENSE why Democrats and weak-kneed RINOS are on the wrong side of an 80-20 issue.

It’s time we pass the SAVE America Act and secure our elections.



— https://nitter.net/SenTuberville/status/2033991773169598893#m

Yesterday, House leadership told the conference that votes were canceled. While we were traveling, they initiated the process to pass votes under suspension, meaning there was not a recorded vote for their Senate bill on artwork.

They knew that the Senate bill could not pass under a rule because of what the Senate has failed to do regarding the state of the SAVE America Act. So they did something called a voice vote.

Just so you understand the BS that we have to deal with up here.

No point unless you embrace talking filibuster. We will kill it.


Punchbowl News (@PunchbowlNews)

VAULT: Thune said the Senate was willing to go to conference with the House over housing affordability legislation that has divided the two chambers.

@BrendanPedersen has the story:
punchbowl.news/article/finan…




— https://nitter.net/PunchbowlNews/status/2033965337084141762#m
